summary: Stripe-level checkout flow testing complete. All features working: Cart Drawer → Checkout Panel → Quote Submission → Success Screen. Backend API (POST /api/customer/checkout-quote) returns quote_number with status pending. Frontend checkout panel has all required elements: Contact (name auto-filled), Delivery, Notes, Order Summary with VAT calc, Trust element, Request Quote CTA, and Sales Assist link.
critical_code_review_comments: CheckoutPanel.jsx correctly implements all required features: Contact section with auto-fill from localStorage, Delivery section, Notes, Order Summary with VAT calculation (18%), Trust element, Request Quote CTA, and Sales Assist link
CartDrawerV2.jsx properly integrates with CheckoutPanel - checkoutOpen state controls panel visibility
CartDrawerContext.jsx provides clean state management for cart items with addItem, removeItem, clearCart functions
Backend customer_checkout_quote_routes.py correctly validates payload, generates quote_number (QT-YYYYMMDD-XXXXXX format), and stores in quotes_v2 collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Checkout flow fully tested. Cart Drawer opens when adding items, Checkout button opens CheckoutPanel (z-60 overlay), form validation works (phone and address required), quote submission creates quote in backend with quote_number, success screen shows 'Quote Submitted!' with Done button that clears cart and closes panels. Sales Assist modal also works from cart drawer.

Form Validation.Submit without phone shows error: PASS - Toast 'Please add a phone number'
Form Validation.Submit without address shows error: PASS - Toast 'Please add your delivery address'

Quote Submission.POST /api/customer/checkout-quote works: PASS - Returns quote_number and status pending
